title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
summary: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-5.6 con mayor inteligencia por token
bajada: OpenAI lanzó GPT-5.6, su nueva familia de modelos que promete mejor rendimiento por dólar y mayor capacidad. El modelo mejora en áreas como ciberseguridad y se integra como modelo preferido en Microsoft 365 Copilot.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched GPT-5.6, its new model family promising better performance per dollar and increased capabilities. The model improves in areas like cybersecurity and becomes the preferred model for Microsoft 365 Copilot.

title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.
title_es: ChatGPT Work: agente de IA que gestiona proyectos completos
bajada: OpenAI presentó ChatGPT Work, un agente de IA que puede actuar en aplicaciones y archivos del usuario, mantener sesiones largas y convertir objetivos en trabajo terminado. Marca un movimiento hacia sistemas más autónomos y productivos.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduced ChatGPT Work, an AI agent that can take action across apps and files, maintain long sessions, and turn goals into finished work. It marks a shift toward more autonomous and productive systems.

title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.
title_es: Anthropic descubre un espacio oculto en el funcionamiento de Claude
bajada: Investigadores de Anthropic desarrollaron la Jacobian lens, una herramienta que ofrece la visión más clara hasta ahora de qué ocurre internamente en los modelos de lenguaje grandes. El hallazgo va desde lo mundano hasta lo inquietante.
bajada_en: Anthropic researchers developed the Jacobian lens, a tool providing the clearest view yet into what happens inside large language models. The discovery ranges from mundane to unsettling findings.

title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.
title_es: Lyzr recaudó $100M usando su propio agente de IA
bajada: La startup Lyzr, que desarrolla agentes de IA empresariales, utilizó su propio agente para gestionar una ronda de financiamiento de $100 millones. Demuestra la madurez de las tecnologías de agentes en aplicaciones reales.
bajada_en: Lyzr, an enterprise AI agent startup, used its own AI agent to manage a $100 million fundraising round. It demonstrates the maturity of agent technologies in real-world applications.

title_es: Fidji Simo se retira del puesto de número 2 en OpenAI
bajada: Fidji Simo, ejecutiva de OpenAI, abandonó su rol de tiempo completo como jefa de trabajo en AGI tras licencia médica prolongada. Ocurre en momento crítico con potencial IPO y competencia empresarial con Anthropic.
bajada_en: Fidji Simo, OpenAI's No. 2 executive, stepped down from her full-time AGI role after extended medical leave. It happens at a critical time with potential IPO and enterprise competition with Anthropic.

title_es: Deutsche Telekom transforma telecomunicaciones con IA de OpenAI
bajada: Deutsche Telekom adopta IA de OpenAI para convertirse en operadora nativa en IA, mejorando servicio al cliente, flujos de empleados y operaciones de red. Caso de uso empresarial en industria crítica de infraestructura.
bajada_en: Deutsche Telekom adopts OpenAI's AI to become an AI-native telecom operator, improving customer service, employee workflows, and network operations. A critical infrastructure industry use case.

title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
summary: Lyzr, a startup that builds AI agents for enterprises, used its own AI agent to raise a $100 million round — proof, evidently, that the product actually works.
title_es: AgentLens: benchmark abierto para evaluar agentes de código
bajada: Investigadores publicaron AgentLens, un benchmark de código abierto que evalúa agentes de código interactivos más allá del simple aprobado/reprobado. Incluye evaluación de trayectoria completa con verificación formal y análisis de LLM.
bajada_en: Researchers released AgentLens, an open-source benchmark that evaluates interactive code agents beyond pass/fail. It includes full trajectory evaluation with formal verification and LLM analysis.

title: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation
summary:
arXiv:2607.06624v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present AgentLens, a production-assessed benchmark for interactive code agents. Most code-agent benchmarks reduce a run to a single bit -- did the task pass? -- but the people who actually use these agents experience the entire trajectory: how the agent follows instructions, uses its tools, verifies its own work, recovers from mistakes, and talks to them along the way. AgentLens evaluates that whole trajectory. It pairs formal verification, where an objective check exists, with LLM-written trajectory reviews and side-by-side comparisons, so that each run yields a readable explanation of why the score is what it is. This makes AgentLens useful for more than ranking models: we use it to diagnose model behavior, compare successive versions of our own agent, and catch product regressions in a nightly evaluation pipeline. We release the benchmark as open source at https://github.com/agent-lens/agent-lens-bench.
title_es: AgentLens: Production-Assessed Trajectory Reviews for Coding Agent Evaluation
bajada:
arXiv:2607.06624v1 Announce Type: new

title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
summary: OpenAI's new family of models will continue to power Microsoft's suite of workplace and productivity apps.
title_es: OpenAI cierra Atlas pero continúa con ambiciones en navegadores
bajada: OpenAI está descontinuando su navegador con IA después de menos de un año, pero trasladará características de navegación agentiva a su app de escritorio y una extensión de Chrome. Señala un cambio en la estrategia de distribución.
bajada_en: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year, but moving agentic browsing features to its desktop app and Chrome extension. It signals a shift in distribution strategy.

title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
summary: OpenAI is sunsetting its AI-powered browser after less than a year. But it's moving some agentic browsing features to its desktop app and a Chrome extension.
title_es: EPFL crea videos de IA para estimular regiones cerebrales
bajada: Investigadores del proyecto NEVO en EPFL desarrollaron método para generar videos con IA optimizados para activar regiones cerebrales específicas. Avance en neurociencia computacional con aplicaciones potenciales en investigación neurológica.
bajada_en: EPFL's NEVO project developed a method to generate AI videos optimized to activate specific brain regions. An advance in computational neuroscience with potential neurological research applications.

title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s No. 2 role
summary: OpenAI's No. 2 executive, Fidji Simo, is stepping down from her full-time role after her medical leave proved longer than expected — a leadership vacuum that comes at a tricky time as the company eyes a possible IPO and races to catch Anthropic in the enterprise market.
title_es: Sunrun lanza centros de datos de IA distribuidos en hogares
bajada: La empresa de energía solar Sunrun expande hacia centros de datos de IA con modelo innovador: pagará clientes por alojar nodos de cómputo en sus hogares. Plantea preguntas sobre distribución de infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: Solar company Sunrun expands into AI data centers with an innovative model: paying customers to host compute nodes in their homes. It raises questions about distributed AI infrastructure.

title: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
summary: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAi's senior leadership, including a long-time former employee.
title_es: Apple demanda a OpenAI por robo de secretos comerciales
bajada: Apple acusa a OpenAI de robar secretos de hardware a través de empleados anteriores de la compañía de Cupertino. La demanda también incluye a IO Products, la startup de hardware de Jony Ive, y alega que OpenAI fomentó el traslado de información confidencial.
bajada_en: Apple accuses OpenAI of stealing hardware secrets through former Apple employees. The lawsuit also names IO Products, Jony Ive's hardware startup, and alleges OpenAI encouraged the transfer of confidential information.

title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
summary: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

bajada: SK Hynix completó el mayor IPO de una empresa extranjera en la historia de Wall Street, impulsado por la demanda de chips de IA. El auge de chips para IA posiciona a los fabricantes surcoreanos como actores clave en la infraestructura global.
bajada_en: SK Hynix completed the largest foreign IPO in Wall Street history, driven by AI chip demand. The AI chip boom positions South Korean manufacturers as key players in global infrastructure.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for allegedly stealing hardware secrets
summary: Apple has sued OpenAI, alleging that engineers stole Apple secrets to advance the AI startup's hardware plans. In its complaint, Apple says it uncovered "a pattern of theft of Apple's trade secrets by OpenAI employees who were formerly at Apple." In addition to OpenAI, the lawsuit also names IO Products - Jony Ive's hardware startup, […]
title_es: Apple demanda a OpenAI por robo de secretos de hardware
bajada: Apple acusa a OpenAI e IO Products de un patrón sistemático de robo de secretos comerciales ejecutado por ingenieros que anteriormente trabajaban en Apple. La demanda incluye presentaciones confidenciales, prototipos secretos y detalles de proveedores.
bajada_en: Apple accuses OpenAI and IO Products of systematic trade secret theft by engineers who previously worked at Apple. The lawsuit includes confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and supplier details.

title: Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
summary: The iPhone maker claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring over confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details.
title_es: Apple demanda a OpenAI por robar secretos de hardware
bajada: Apple reclama que OpenAI incentivó a empleados contratados para traer presentaciones confidenciales, prototipos secretos y detalles clave de proveedores. La demanda evidencia tensiones crecientes entre grandes tech sobre propiedad intelectual en IA.
bajada_en: Apple claims OpenAI encouraged poached employees to bring confidential presentations, secret prototypes, and key supplier details. The lawsuit reveals growing tensions between tech giants over IP ownership in AI.

bajada: Un reporte documenta cómo el grupo terrorista Boko Haram está adoptando herramientas de IA para mejorar sus capacidades operacionales. El hallazgo subraya riesgos de seguridad críticos del acceso abierto a tecnología de IA avanzada.
bajada_en: A report documents how terrorist group Boko Haram is adopting frontier AI tools to enhance operational capabilities. The finding underscores critical security risks of open access to advanced AI technology.

title: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]
title_es: El CEO de Hugging Face: el IA open source es más importante que nunca
bajada: Clem Delangue, CEO de Hugging Face, destaca el crecimiento explosivo del IA open source, con la plataforma siendo usada por aproximadamente la mitad del Fortune 500. El modelo de compartir modelos y datasets abiertos está transformando cómo las empresas adoptan IA.
bajada_en: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue highlights explosive growth in open source AI, with the platform used by roughly half of Fortune 500 companies. The model of sharing open models and datasets is transforming how enterprises adopt AI.

title: Hugging Face’s CEO on why companies are done renting their AI
summary: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]
title_es: Empresas quieren poseer su IA, no alquilarla: CEO de Hugging Face
bajada: Las empresas están migrando desde modelos de IA como servicio hacia soluciones open source que pueden poseer y personalizar. Esta tendencia refleja un cambio fundamental en cómo las organizaciones evalúan soberanía de datos y costos a largo plazo.
bajada_en: Companies are shifting from AI-as-a-service models toward open source solutions they can own and customize. This trend reflects a fundamental change in how organizations evaluate data sovereignty and long-term costs.

title: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra produces proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture [pdf]
summary: https://x.com/__eknight__/status/2075643450196971805,https://xcancel.com/__eknight__/status/2075643450196971805Prompt:https://cdn.openai.com/pdf/04d1d1e4-bc75-476a-97cf-49055cd98...Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48863490Points: 252# Comments: 219
title_es: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra demuestra la Conjetura del Ciclo Doble
bajada: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra genera una prueba de la Conjetura del Ciclo Doble, un problema matemático sin resolver durante décadas. El logro ejemplifica el potencial de modelos avanzados para resolver problemas teóricos complejos.
bajada_en: GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra generates a proof of the Cycle Double Cover Conjecture, an unsolved mathematical problem for decades. The achievement exemplifies the potential of advanced models to solve complex theoretical problems.

title: GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, Claude, and Muse Spark build the same 4 apps
summary: Article URL:https://www.tryai.dev/blog/gpt-5.6-build-off-12-modelsComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48865093Points: 113# Comments: 69
title_es: GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5 y Claude construyen las mismas 4 apps
bajada: Un análisis comparativo muestra que diferentes modelos de lenguaje (GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, Claude y Muse) producen aplicaciones similares cuando se les da la misma tarea. Este resultado sugiere convergencia en capacidades entre modelos competidores.
bajada_en: A comparative analysis shows that different language models (GPT-5.6, Grok 4.5, Claude, and Muse) produce similar applications when given the same task. The result suggests capability convergence among competing models.

title: Please don't discontinue Gemini 2.5 Flash

bajada: Desarrolladores alertan sobre la posible discontinuación de Gemini 2.5 Flash, un modelo ampliamente utilizado. La preocupación refleja la dependencia de la comunidad en modelos específicos y la importancia de la estabilidad en APIs de IA.
bajada_en: Developers alert about potential discontinuation of Gemini 2.5 Flash, a widely-used model. The concern reflects community dependence on specific models and the importance of stability in AI APIs.

title: Why doesn't the ML research community limit the number of submissions per author? [D]
summary: I am currently working across multiple research communities, and I've noticed that the ML community is struggling with a massive volume of submissions, which is affecting review quality (as we are seeing in the recent ARR cycles).I am wondering what the reasoning is for not limiting the number of submissions per author?This practice has been successfully used in other research areas for years, such as Security (e.g., CCS) or Computer Architecture (e.g., DAC), to help keep workloads manageable. Is there a particular cultural reason why the ML community chooses a different approach?submitted by/u/alafaya101[link][comments]
title_es: Comunidad ML debate limitar envíos por autor para mejorar reviews
bajada: Investigadores proponen limitar el número de artículos que un autor puede enviar a conferencias para mejorar la calidad de revisiones. La idea, exitosa en seguridad e ingeniería de computadores, busca manejar el volumen explosivo de papers.
bajada_en: Researchers propose limiting the number of papers an author can submit to conferences to improve review quality. The idea, successful in security and computer architecture, aims to handle explosive paper volume.
